basic_details.job_title: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Banaras Hindu University (BHU) has officially announced the Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates up to 28 years of age holding an M.Sc. in Chemistry with at least 55% aggregate marks (or equivalent grade) and qualified in UGC/ CSIR NET or GATE can submit their online applications on or before 15 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PH candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Sc. in Chemistry with at least 55% aggregate marks (or equivalent grade) and qualified UGC/CSIR NET or GATE
qualification.details: M. Sc. in Chemistry with at least 55% aggregate marks (or equivalent grade) and have qualified UGC/CSIR NET or GATE.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (1st & 2nd year) Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA (3rd year)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BHU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.banaras_hindu_university_bhu: M. Sc. in Chemistry with at least 55% aggregate marks (or equivalent grade) and qualified UGC/CSIR NET or GATE

content_sections.heading: BHU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BHU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M. Sc. in Chemistry with at least 55% aggregate marks (or equivalent grade) and have qualified UGC/CSIR NET or GATE.

content_sections.heading: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PH candidates.

content_sections.heading: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (1st & 2nd year) Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA (3rd year)

content_sections.heading: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BHU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHU Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow position at Banaras Hindu University is 15th August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M. Sc. in Chemistry with at least 55% aggregate marks and have qualified UGC/CSIR NET or GATE to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PH candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the BHU Junior Research Fellow application?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- p.m. + HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position at Banaras Hindu University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the BHU Junior Research Fellow recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at Banaras Hindu University is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Banaras Hindu University located?
faq.answer: Banaras Hindu University is located in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 221005.
